CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-28-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-05-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Josh S. Brownstein, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Edward E. Frey, an individual, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Shawman Group, LLC, dba Fluid Bar $ Lounge, a California limited liability company, Wilfred Shaw, an individual, John Park, an individual, or Peter Mann, an individual.
Defaults were entered against defendant on August 25, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, January 5, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Edward E. Frey, an individual, and against the Defaulted Defendants Shawman Group, LLC, dba Fluid Bar $ Lounge, a California limited liability company, Wilfred Shaw, an individual, John Park, an individual, and Peter Mann, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $14,009.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $968.00.
Attorney Fees - $1,750.00.
Costs - $729.55, for a total judgment in the amount of $17,456.55.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2009 Continued To Feb-11-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
